summary: Tested new project detail page feature. All 10 test cases passed: backend endpoints, frontend navigation, project detail page rendering, admin panel new fields, and error handling.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Project detail pages at /projects/:id fully working. GET /api/projects/p1 and p2 return detail_text and detail_images. Clicking project cards navigates to /projects/{id}. BACK TO PORTFOLIO and ALL PROJECTS buttons return to homepage. Admin Projects tab has DETAIL PAGE TEXT (textarea), DETAIL PAGE IMAGES (textarea), VIDEO URL, EXTERNAL LINK fields all present. Non-existent project returns 'Project not found'. Paper texture background (#F5F0E8) confirmed on detail page.
verified_items: GET /api/projects/p1: returns detail_text and detail_images fields
GET /api/projects/p2: returns detail_text and detail_images fields
Project detail page /projects/p1: shows cover image, title 'Brand Identity Motion', description, detail text, tags (MOTION, BRANDING), gallery section
Clicking project card in carousel navigates to /projects/p2
BACK TO PORTFOLIO click navigates to homepage /
ALL PROJECTS button click navigates to homepage /
Admin Projects tab: DETAIL PAGE TEXT textarea present with content
Admin Projects tab: DETAIL PAGE IMAGES textarea present with URLs
Admin Projects tab: VIDEO URL (optional) input present
Admin Projects tab: EXTERNAL LINK (optional) input present
Paper texture background (#F5F0E8) confirmed on project detail page
